_comment: Optional connector registry overrides. The bundled defaults are wired automatically by skillfile run — entries here are additions and overrides. Per the v1 spec, multi-instance is first-class: register as many SkillStore / MemoryStore / LocalModel / McpConnector instances as you need.

_example_disabled.comment: Uncomment and configure to wire an MCP server. Bundled `CallbackMcpConnector` is for embedders. Real HTTP-bridge `McpHttpConnector` lands in a follow-up release.
Register additional MemoryStore instances here if you need more than the bundled-default SQLite store at ~/.skillscript/memory.db.
